hosts.comments: Critical. All example.test DNS overrides resolve here.
Had NO reservation on FortiGate. Pinning is critical.
Had NO reservation on FortiGate. Pinning is critical.
Samba, NFS, iSCSI, NZBGet. Pin to prevent mount breakage.

rule.descr: Default allow LAN to any rule
Default allow LAN IPv6 to any rule

dot.description: Forward default domain to Dnsmasq DHCP
